cases.name: blocks on secret-access correlated with egress

input.task: a script that reads the process environment and posts it to an external host

cases.rationale: the exfiltration signature is the unwaivable block condition

cases.name: sends capability drift to review

input.task: a skill declaring 'no network' that contains an outbound call

cases.rationale: a signature on a drifting bundle proves identity, not safety
